creator: dev@submerge.ch
text:
(In reply to Nuno Teixeira from comment #18)
> Hello all,
> 
> multimedia/kodi is at version 20.5.
> 
> Does this problem still affects current version?
> 
> Cheers

Kodi from quarterly is still at 20.4, but I can confirm that it starts without the LD_PRELOAD workaround. Tested with nvidia-driver-340 on 14.0-RELEASE. I think this bug report can be closed, thanks.
